title: SQL: timestamp crashes monet or returns null on parse error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 12:00:00');
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (2, TIMESTAMP '2004-01-04 10:03:00');
SELECT id, event_time FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_time IS NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_time = TIMESTAMP '1783-06-01 00:00:00';
